title: Amtech C0228 Plastic Pipe Cutter
features: DURABLE AND EASY TO USE: This plastic pipe cutter is made from strong aluminium with a low profile design for ease of access
VERSATILE: With a maximum 34mm diameter cutting capacity, it is ideal for cutting polybutylene, PE-X and rigid nylon pipes
SIZE CAPACITY: 34mm range ideal for plumbing and trade tasks
PRECISION CUTTING: Provides smooth and accurate results
GENERAL DIY TASKS: Versatile addition to any home or professional toolkit
